text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 9 day(s) like this, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 6 day(s), though I notice it's not improving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 6 day(s) like this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 10 day(s), deteriorating, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 13 day(s) ago, though it seems to be slowly resolving. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate
